trigger_event: Critical @ mention integration failure across production components

integration_blind_spot_pattern.description: Components exist but don't actually integrate - classic works in isolation, fails in integration

line_798_812.issue: Debug banner indicates component exists but integration is broken

line_36.issue: Import exists but component not properly integrated

line_161.issue: Ref created but not used for proper integration

line_295_297.issue: Debug banner indicates broken integration despite flag being true

event_handler_conflict_pattern.description: Parent component event handlers interfering with child component functionality

line_801_810.issue: Parent component trying to control child input behavior
line_801_810.conflict: Parent onChange competing with MentionInput internal state

line_521_547.issue: Custom input handling potentially blocking MentionInput events
line_521_547.conflict: Multiple input handlers creating event interference

props_misconfiguration_pattern.description: Missing or incorrectly configured props preventing component function

misconfigured_props.rows: Static value may not work with dynamic content

prop_issues.mentionContext: Passed as 'comment' but may not be properly handled
prop_issues.useMentionInput: Boolean flag creates conditional rendering issues

state_management_conflict_pattern.description: Parent component state interfering with child component state management

content_state.conflict: Parent manages content state while MentionInput also manages state
content_state.anti_pattern: Dual state management without proper synchronization

mention_state.conflict: Parent tracks mentions separately from MentionInput
mention_state.anti_pattern: State duplication leading to synchronization issues

content_state.synchronization_issue: Parent and child state can become out of sync

tdd_analysis.test_coverage: Limited unit tests, no integration tests for mention functionality
missed_test_cases: Integration between parent component state and MentionInput state
Event propagation from MentionInput to parent components
tdd_failure_points: No tests for component integration patterns
Missing tests for event handler conflicts
No validation tests for props configuration
Lack of state management conflict detection

integration_failure_signatures: Debug banners in production code indicating broken functionality
Conditional rendering creating integration blind spots
Event handler competition between parent and child
component_hierarchy_antipatterns: Parent controlling child input behavior incorrectly
Props passed but not properly configured
State managed in multiple places without coordination
Event handlers interfering across component boundaries
debugging_antipatterns: Emergency debug code left in production

testing_patterns: Mock child component behavior in parent tests
Test actual DOM events and interactions
Validate state consistency across component boundary

component_design_patterns.single_source_of_truth: One component should own the state
component_design_patterns.ref_usage_patterns: Use refs for imperative actions only

development_practices.remove_debug_code: Never leave debug banners in production
development_practices.integration_validation: Test components together, not just in isolation
development_practices.state_architecture: Design clear state management patterns upfront

immediate_actions: Remove debug banners from production code
Consolidate state management to single source of truth
Fix props configuration in parent components
